productDisplayName: Lotto Men Maroon Juve Flip Flop
description: Style Note Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Product Details Maroon flip flop with thong style black synthetic straps with branding appliqued on the strap and a fabric toe separator Soft footbed with cool print Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves and branded lugs for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
